summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete. All 20 pytest tests passed covering wave-decrement regression, sold-out edge, discount code, Stripe checkout, finalize idempotency, my/tickets, invoice PDF, door scan (valid/repeat/unknown/RBAC), admin CRUD (artists/projects/discounts/gallery/events), special-link flow, event cancel and order refund.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1130 lines; consider splitting into modules (auth, ticketing, admin, invoices) for maintainability.
/api/seed is a public POST that can seed on empty DB — acceptable for MVP but should be gated behind admin auth or a startup env flag in production.

_finalize_paid_reservation uses a two-step update+read to guard idempotency: relies on `status: 'pending'` filter for atomicity, but the subsequent tickets.insert_many and invoices.insert_one are NOT inside a transaction. Two very-concurrent calls could theoretically both pass the pending guard on the very first race window; the update filter mitigates this well, but a Mongo session/transaction would harden it. Not observed in testing.

In webhook_stripe, payment_transactions.payment_status is set to 'paid' before finalize; if finalize raises, txn state and reservation state can diverge. Consider ordering: finalize first, then mark txn paid.
Reservation cleanup only runs when a NEW reservation is attempted for the same event; expired holds on unvisited events are never returned. Consider a background cleanup task.
STRIPE_API_KEY default value 'sk_test_emergent' is hardcoded as a fallback — safer to require it explicitly like MONGO_URL/DB_NAME.
require_admin has dead branch: after the (admin, door) not-in check, checking door again is redundant; simplify to `if role != 'admin'`.
GET /events/{slug} mutates the returned event dict when adding is_active/available — cosmetic only.
No pagination on list endpoints (admin/orders limits to 500, others to 200/500 with to_list); fine for MVP but flag for scale.
test_credentials: Bearer tokens for admin/door/user roles were minted via mongosh (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test file also mints fresh users on demand via _fresh_user_headers() to avoid state leaks.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed was invoked (idempotent). Tests additionally create ephemeral admin-owned test events for scan/cancel scenarios and delete them after use.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py is fully deterministic: each state-mutating test mints its own fresh user via mongosh so max_tickets_per_user (4) is never hit across runs. Rerun with: `cd /app && UMB_ADMIN_TOKEN=<admin> UMB_DOOR_TOKEN=<door> UMB_USER_TOKEN=<u1> UMB_USER2_TOKEN=<u2> pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v -n 0`. The suite also verifies the previously-fixed wave-decrement regression (reserving on GENERAL now correctly decrements only GENERAL and leaves EARLY_BIRD & VIP untouched).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — iteration 1 fix ($elemMatch on the correct wave_id) is confirmed working by test_reservation_decrements_correct_wave. Special-link path correctly bypasses wave decrement and increments special_links.used only after finalize. Finalize idempotency verified by calling _finalize_paid_reservation twice and asserting exactly 1 invoice + N tickets.
